title: ChaseSoundMod
description: Assign custom music to players. Inspired by the Roblox game Forsaken. Features automatic .ogg loading and in-game GUI.
body:
Inspired by the Roblox game Forsaken.

"ChaseSounds" is a "Client-Side" Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21 that allows you to assign custom music or sound effects to specific players. When a tracked player gets within a certain range, your custom sound will play automatically. This is perfect for PvP, roleplay, or just having fun with friends.

⚠️ This mod is completely Client-Side. It does not need to be installed on the server.

🚀 Key Features

🎵 Custom Audio Loading: Load your own `.ogg` files directly from your PC using the in-game file selector.

📂 Automatic Resource Pack: The mod automatically generates and enables a local Resource Pack for your sounds—no manual file editing or game restarts required!

⚙️ In-Game Configuration: A clean, easy-to-use GUI to manage tracked players and assign sounds.

📏 Proximity Detection: Adjust the detection range (distance) using a slider. The sound plays when the player enters this radius.

🖱️ User Friendly: Includes a "Chases" button to easily browse and import audio files from your computer.

## 📖 How to Use

1.  Press the keybind "O".
2.  Click the "Chases" button to open the file explorer.
3.  Select an `.ogg` audio file from your computer.
4.  Assign it to one of the 10 available slots (Chase 1, Chase 2, etc.).
5.  In the main configuration screen, type the "username" of the player you want to track.
6.  Select the sound you just assigned (e.g., "Chase 1") and click "Add".
7.  Done! When that player gets close to you, the music will play.
